name: Shrimp Fried Rice (Hom)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the scallions.
2. Cut the shrimp into fine dice.
3. Blanch the peas in a saucepan of boiling water for about 5 minutes if they are fresh or 2 minutes if they are frozen. Drain them in a colander.
4. Heat a wok or large skillet until hot. Add the oil and wait until it is almost smoking.
5. Add the cooked rice and stir-fry it for 1 minute.
6. Add the shrimp, peas, and salt. Continue to stir-fry the mixture for 5 minutes over high heat.
7. Add the beaten eggs and bean sprouts. Stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes or until the eggs have set.
8. Turn off the heat and serve on a plate garnished with scallions.
